# Changelog

## [v0.9] - 2026-04-06

### Added

- Support for multiple custom fields for leads in Contact Form 7 and WooCommerce (available in the pro version)
- Each tab is now accessible via a separate URL

### Changed

- Dependencies update
- Updated changelog

### Fixed

- Fixed bugs related to data sanitization
- Fixed display of tabs on mobile devices

## [v0.8] - 2025-03-04

### Added

- Reauthorize button
- Copy button for external URL

### Changed

- Dependencies update

## [v0.7.2-beta] - 2025-01-29

### Changed

- Dependencies update

## [v0.7.1-beta] - 2024-12-09

### Fixed

- Bug fixes

## [v0.7-beta] - 2024-12-06

> Important: This version is not compatible with previous versions. Before installing, the old version must be removed.

### Added

- Support for WPForms
- Pipelines and statuses from the CRM are now directly displayed within the form

### Fixed

- Bug fixes

## [v0.6.1-pre-alpha] - 2024-09-12

### Added

- Support for WooCommerce comments (available in the pro version)

## [v0.6-pre-alpha] - 2024-07-25

### Added

- Support for Elementor Pro Forms (for developers, available in the pro version)

### Fixed

- Bug fixes

## [v0.5.2] - 2024-03-19

### Removed

- Support for PHP 7.1

### Changed

- Minimum PHP version increased to 8.0
- Dependencies update
- Saving sessions in the admin directory of the module

## [v0.5.1] - 2024-02-03

### Changed

- Updated the module name

## [v0.5] - 2024-01-31

### Added

- Ability to create multiple custom fields that will be appended to comments (available in the pro version)

## [v0.4] - 2023-12-23
